title: Update eslint-config-algolia to version 6.0.1 🚀
body:
Hello lovely humans, [eslint-config-algolia](https://www.npmjs.com/package/eslint-config-algolia) just published its new version 6.0.1.
State Update :rocket:
Dependency eslint-config-algolia
New version 6.0.1
Type devDependency
This version is **not covered** by your **current version range**. Without accepting this pull request your project will work just like it did before. There might be a bunch of new features, fixes and perf improvements that the maintainers worked on for you though. I recommend you look into these changes and try to get onto the latest version of eslint-config-algolia. Given that you have a decent test suite, a passing build is a strong indicator that you can take advantage of these changes by merging the proposed change into your project. Otherwise this branch is a great starting point for you to work on the update. Do you have any ideas how I could improve these pull requests? Did I report anything you think isn’t right? Are you unsure about how things are supposed to work? There is a collection of [frequently asked questions](https://greenkeeper.io/faq.html) and while I’m just a bot, there is a group of people who are happy to teach me new things. [Let them know](https://github.com/greenkeeperio/greenkeeper/issues/new). Good luck with your project :sparkles: You rock! :palm_tree: --- The new version differs by 60 commits . - [`039c583`](https://github.com/algolia/eslint-config-algolia/commit/039c583ea791ab09e5304defe54be7e8e227114a) release v6.0.1 - [`ed5ec9a`](https://github.com/algolia/eslint-config-algolia/commit/ed5ec9a61e580c1b7df3f6146bd45d88ec7b69ad) test(comma-dangle): add test about no comma dangle on rest props - [`7e20863`](https://github.com/algolia/eslint-config-algolia/commit/7e2086329bb9d1a94276936f4663701e909dca51) chore(deps): stop pining deps, yarn handles it at app level - [`149134c`](https://github.com/algolia/eslint-config-algolia/commit/149134c510e2e36146bf4fcda5bc63272f8788d8) Merge pull request #26 from algolia/greenkeeper-eslint-plugin-react-6.4.1 - [`1766ad9`](https://github.com/algolia/eslint-config-algolia/commit/1766ad919fa710f1161e70c93fac973c153f648a) Merge pull request #27 from algolia/greenkeeper-eslint-plugin-import-2.0.1 - [`1ce557e`](https://github.com/algolia/eslint-config-algolia/commit/1ce557eae210caac9be30a476e60510e4ecb5b65) Merge pull request #28 from algolia/greenkeeper-eslint-3.8.0 - [`54d3482`](https://github.com/algolia/eslint-config-algolia/commit/54d34825b4e47737666d772db700dc0ec1e255d5) chore(package): update eslint to version 3.8.0 - [`c63e162`](https://github.com/algolia/eslint-config-algolia/commit/c63e1623ff17d7b259e4c457c61d7c26e5ae7e32) chore(package): update eslint-plugin-import to version 2.0.1 - [`61735ba`](https://github.com/algolia/eslint-config-algolia/commit/61735ba7033a8162c1e27425f59dbe3d862ab77a) chore(package): update eslint-plugin-react to version 6.4.1 - [`6579331`](https://github.com/algolia/eslint-config-algolia/commit/6579331f4e9c10f8cf2c5cb5519a20bb7185136f) Merge pull request #24 from algolia/greenkeeper-eslint-3.7.1 - [`7f6dfc5`](https://github.com/algolia/eslint-config-algolia/commit/7f6dfc504dce5ac1d27bff022e0a49f65b27dd90) chore(package): update eslint to version 3.7.1 - [`1820c1a`](https://github.com/algolia/eslint-config-algolia/commit/1820c1a80ebd037f0ad042637659fab623debc04) Merge pull request #22 from algolia/greenkeeper-eslint-plugin-import-2.0.0 - [`e1b8a56`](https://github.com/algolia/eslint-config-algolia/commit/e1b8a56ebd98167d4ab55477c31b50c4a9f3e470) release v6.0.0 - [`ce194dd`](https://github.com/algolia/eslint-config-algolia/commit/ce194dd69349ac4b7e10b36db166708958f1555f) feat(rules): new default rules - [`95ac3b8`](https://github.com/algolia/eslint-config-algolia/commit/95ac3b83ceba058dd77f28a2411af227f0971084) chore(package): update eslint-plugin-import to version 2.0.0 There are 60 commits in total. See the [full diff](https://github.com/algolia/eslint-config-algolia/compare/d283010e24008c2302689f84936d81fca504d2ff...039c583ea791ab09e5304defe54be7e8e227114a). --- This pull request was created by [greenkeeper.io](https://greenkeeper.io/).
